verdict: The chart is heavily marred by physically impossible three-panel holds (unintentional hands) and extreme, lazy pattern repetition.

issues.problem: Requires pressing Left and Right simultaneously while holding Down (from 9.736), creating an impossible three-panel note for pad play without using hands.
Requires tapping Down while both Up (15.444) and Right (15.700) are being held, forcing an awkward three-panel press.
Extremely repetitive looping of the exact same 'L -> R -> U -> D' pattern for over 10 seconds, which feels lazy and monotonous.
Another lengthy, repetitive 'U -> D -> L -> R' pattern loop lasting over 10 seconds during a major section of the song.
Holding Down while performing rapid taps on Up, Left, and Right forces highly awkward, unbalanced crossovers.
